entities.name: PHENOTYPIC CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of using ninety phenotypic traits to characterize rhizobial isolates

entities.name: FAST GROWERS
entities.description: A growth rate characteristic where 38% of isolates were identified

entities.name: SLOW GROWERS
entities.description: A growth rate characteristic where 62% of isolates were identified

entities.name: ANTIBIOTIC RESISTANCE
entities.description: The intrinsic ability of isolates to resist specific antibiotics

entities.name: HEAVY METAL RESISTANCE
entities.description: The intrinsic ability of isolates to resist manganese sulphate and copper chloride

entities.name: SALT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of isolates to tolerate NaCl concentrations greater than 3%

entities.name: TEMPERATURE TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of isolates to tolerate high temperatures of 45°C

entities.name: CHLORAMPHENICOL
entities.description: An antibiotic used to test for intrinsic resistance

entities.description: An antibiotic used to test for intrinsic resistance

entities.description: An antibiotic used to test for intrinsic resistance

entities.name: MANGANESE SULPHATE
entities.description: A heavy metal used to test for intrinsic resistance

entities.name: COPPER CHLORIDE
entities.description: A heavy metal used to test for intrinsic resistance

entities.name: UPGMA
entities.description: Unweighted pair group method with arithmetic means used for constructing a dendrogram
